generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent‑magnet synchronous motor of the first vertical axis of MABI MAX 100, receives current Iₒ as control input and generates motor torque τₒ."
]

// C3: Physical sensing components
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Absolute position encoder mounted on the motor shaft."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
]
instance GearboxEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Absolute position encoder positioned behind the gearbox."
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxPositionDataTransmitted
]
instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring commanded current Iₒ reported by the Siemens SINUMERIK 840D controller."
    DTDFVocab:producedData CurrentDataTransmitted
]
instance JointVelocitySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor component of controller providing angular velocity ω and acceleration δ derived from encoder readings."
    DTDFVocab:producedData AngularVelocityDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical‑to‑virtual interaction
instance MotorPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]
instance GearboxPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxEncoder
]
instance CurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]
instance AngularVelocityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom JointVelocitySensor
]

// C10: Data traces (time‑series)
instance MotorPositionTimeSeries : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series trace of motor position θ produced by MotorEncoder."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTDataStreamingEnabler, AASEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
]
instance GearboxPositionTimeSeries : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series trace of gearbox position θ produced by GearboxEncoder."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTDataStreamingEnabler, AASEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxPositionDataTransmitted
]
instance CurrentTimeSeries : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series trace of commanded current Iₒ produced by MotorCurrentSensor."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTDataStreamingEnabler, AASEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentDataTransmitted
]
instance AngularVelocityTimeSeries : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series trace of joint angular velocity ω produced by JointVelocitySensor."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTDataStreamingEnabler, AASEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData AngularVelocityDataTransmitted
]
instance MotorTorqueTimeSeries : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series trace of motor torque τ derived from current Iₒ."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTDataStreamingEnabler, AASEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentDataTransmitted
]
instance GearboxTorqueTimeSeries : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series trace of gearbox torque τ₍gear₎ derived from MotorTorque."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTDataStreamingEnabler, AASEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
]
instance JointTorqueOutputTimeSeries : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series trace of joint torque τ_out produced by motor, gearbox, and cycloidal gearbox."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTDataStreamingEnabler, AASEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxPositionDataTransmitted
]
instance FrictionTorqueTimeSeries : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series trace of friction torque estimated from joint torque and velocity."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTDataStreamingEnabler, AASEnabler
    DTDFVocab:fromData AngularVelocityDataTransmitted
]

// C10: Engineering and simulation models
instance SysMLBlockMotor : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML block‑definition model of the permanent‑magnet synchronous motor."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AASEnabler
]
instance SysMLBlockGearbox : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML block‑definition model of the first gear transmission."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AASEnabler
]
instance SysMLBlockCycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML block‑definition model of the cycloidal gearbox."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AASEnabler
]
instance MATLABSimulinkMotorModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink executable model of the motor dynamics."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AASEnabler
]
instance MATLABSimulinkGearboxModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink executable model of the gearbox dynamics."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AASEnabler
]
instance MATLABSimulinkFrictionCoulombViscousModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink model implementing Coulomb‑viscous friction."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AASEnabler
]
instance MATLABSimulinkFrictionStribeckModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink model implementing Stribeck friction."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AASEnabler
]
instance MATLABSimulinkFrictionDahlModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink model implementing Dahl friction."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AASEnabler
]
instance MATLABSimulinkFrictionLuGreModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink model implementing LuGre friction."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AASEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance MQTTDataStreamingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker component streaming real‑time data from robot sensors to the digital twin."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService
]
instance AASEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell linking engineered models and data traces to their digital twin entities."
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, FrictionModelExchangeService, ControlParameterUpdateService
]

// C6: Services
instance DataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Web‑based dashboard providing real‑time visualization of raw and simulated data."
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeDataVisualizationInsight
]
instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service performing continuous multi‑physics‑aware identification of joint friction."
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeFrictionCoefficientInsight, FrictionLossIncreaseInsight
]
instance FrictionModelExchangeService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service allowing dynamic exchange between white‑box and black‑box friction models."
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelSwitchingAction
]
instance ControlParameterUpdateService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for updating control parameters based on inferred friction characteristics."
    DTDFVocab:provides UpdateControlParametersAction
]

// C17: Insights
instance RealTimeFrictionCoefficientInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight providing realtime updates of friction coefficient derived from continuous identification."
]
instance FrictionLossIncreaseInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight detecting increase in friction loss in the joint."
]
instance RealTimeDataVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight delivering real‑time visualization of raw and simulated data on the dashboard."
]
instance ModelSwitchingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action to switch between white‑box and black‑box friction models in the simulation."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]
instance UpdateControlParametersAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic action to update motor current control parameters based on inferred friction characteristics."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]
instance PlanMaintenanceAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Manual action to plan maintenance based on wear‑pattern insights."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Not in Document
"
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real‑time data streaming occurs via MQTT; the exact sampling period is not specified in the document, but the system is designed for on‑line processing and visualization of the incoming data streams."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Centralised architecture comprising the asset model, engineered structural and simulation models, the processing component that consumes sensor data and model calculations, data traces with traceability, and a user dashboard that displays real‑time results.
"
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The digital shadow covers the operational phase of the robot, starting from live operation, continuously identifying friction changes during use, and adjusting the control model accordingly.
"
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "High traceability of each data point back to its origin and model. White‑box analytical models capture load and temperature effects; black‑box data‑driven models eliminate parameter identification. Continuous identification compensates for wear and tool changes, ensuring validity during operation.
"
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Data is transmitted from the CNC controller to the digital shadow using MQTT over the factory network, with each data series labeled by a source channel.
"
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Not in Document
"
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Not in Document
"
]

instance data_ownership_and_privacy : DTDFVocab:DataOwnershipPrivacy [
    base:desc "Not in Document
"
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Use of SysML for system modification, Asset Administration Shell (AAS) standard for data linking, referencing the digital shadow reference model by Kritzinger et al. and the UML class diagram of the Digital Shadow Reference Model (DSRM).
"
]
